title: What it actually looks like to be ambitious and surrendered
caption:
Surrender and ambition aren’t opposites. Most men just never learned to hold both.

The man who has to win to feel okay isn’t ambitious. He’s desperate.

But the man who does nothing and calls it faith isn’t surrendered. He’s passive.

The sequence matters: seek first. Then work.

#discipline #faith #christianmen #ambition #surrender #godlymen #manofgod #thework
